issues.message: known-stale citation to a target that does not exist in the current corpus: urn:lex-mx:federal:statute:lisr:article:216-bis — Transitorio Sexto expressly cites 'el artículo 216 Bis de la Ley del Impuesto sobre la Renta vigente hasta 2013' — the pre-2014-rewrite article numbering, in the same breath mapping it to current article 182 ('vigente a partir de 2014'). The committed LISR corpus is the consolidated post-2014 text only, so the historical target never resolves; this is a disclosed historical cross-reference, not an ingestion gap.
